title: File depended status change automation
excerpt:
Hello! 
I wanted to ask if there is any way to change the status of a row when one or more files are added to a single column in the same row . 
For example 1 file uploaded=Status 1,   2 files uploaded= Status 2 
Thanks …

posts.author: SamKh (Sam Khorsandy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I wanted to ask if there is any way to change the status of a row when one or more files are added to a single column in the same row .

For example 1 file uploaded=Status 1, 2 files uploaded= Status 2

Thanks in advance!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@SamKh

The simple answer is no, not with base monday unless you use something like Make to create a custom solution.

However, if you can provide more details on your use case, maybe I can help more.

Jim - The Monday Man (YouTube Channel)
What is Make & How can it help you with monday?
We Create Custom Solutions - Your Make or Ours
Schedule a 1-on-1 Tutorial Session (for monday, Make or Excel)

posts.author: SamKh (Sam Khorsandy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @JCorrell thanks for the response.

I have added a screenshot here. So far I have been doing the changes manually but wanted to see if there was a more efficient way to do it.

Let me know if this example helps. I appreciate your support!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@SamKh

It makes sense. But currently, that would require a solution using monday’s API… like the aforementioned Make.

posts.author: SamKh (Sam Khorsandy)
posts.cookedHtml: Well received. Thank you for the tip, I will look into it.
